---
title: "Analysis Script for Social and Cultural Dynamics 2026"
author: "Andrea Wiwe Kjær-Hansen, Mikkel Krøjer Svendsen"
format: html
---

```{r}
# Packages
library(rethinking)
library(dagitty)
library(ggdag)
library(tidyverse)

# Theme settings
theme_set(theme_minimal())

# data directory
source("data_dir.R")
```

```{r}
# read files helper
read_files <- function(pattern) {
  list.files(
    data_dir,
    pattern = pattern,
    full.names = TRUE
  ) |>
    map_dfr(~ read.delim2(.x, sep = ","))
}
```

```{r}
# read files
d_simon <- read_files("simon") |>
  mutate(
    rt_ms = as.numeric(ifelse(rt_ms == "", NA, rt_ms)),
    response_key = ifelse(response_key == "", NA, response_key),
    side_congruent = (shape == "square" & side == "left") |
      (shape == "diamond" & side == "right")
  )

d_tapping <- read_files("tapping")

d_info <- read_files("group_info")
```

## Descriptive statistics

```{r}
age <- d_info |>
  summarize(
    age_mean = mean(age),
    age_sd = sd(age)
  )

gender <- d_info |>
  count(gender) |>
  mutate(
    prop = n / sum(n)
  )

condition <- d_tapping |>
  distinct(dyad_id, .keep_all = T) |>
  count(condition, name = "n_dyads")

print(age)
print(gender)
print(condition)
```


```{r}
d_simon |>
  group_by(task, side_congruent) |>
  summarize(
    rt_mean = mean(rt_ms, na.rm = T)
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = side_congruent, y = rt_mean, color = task, group = task)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Incongruent", "Congruent")) +
  labs(
    x = "Stimulus Side",
    y = "Mean RT (ms)",
    color = "Task",
    title = "Simon Effect by Task Condition"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
d_simon |>
  group_by(task, side_congruent) |>
  summarize(
    rt_mean = mean(rt_ms, na.rm = T)
  )
```
